home_h1_1: Shortage of manpower in the finishing work industry?
home_h2_3:
The professional choice
for perfect grouting
home_h2_4:
Every joint — testament
to professional precision
home_p_25: The automatic machine for tile grout filling
home_p_27: GROUTBOT — a machine for filling grout in joints — is currently being developed for professionals who demand accurate and perfect results in every job. Three main advantages of working with GROUTBOT
home_p_28:
GROUTBOT is designed to enable uniform and precise filling of joints in any width and depth. The application head is adapted to the joint lines and ensures complete and uniform coverage — without exhausting work on your knees.
Most importantly, the machine will advance at a fast rate of over 200 sqm in 8 working hours including machine operation time.
home_p_29: The machine's advanced control mechanism is designed to reduce excess grout and prevent stains on tile surfaces. Significant reduction in cleaning time after work — the floor will remain clean, and you'll focus on the final result rather than cleaning up the mess.
home_p_30: Designed to withstand demanding projects — renovations, new construction, commercial flooring and contracting work. The robust body and powerful motor ensure consistent performance throughout long working hours, on any type of surface and grout.
home_p_31: GROUTBOT is developed for professionals who refuse to compromise — and is also perfectly suited for the advanced user who demands contractor-level results. One machine that will change the entire grouting process.
home_p_32: Uniform and continuous filling along the entire joint line — without variable manual pressure, without partial strips. Every meter looks like the first.
home_p_33: What takes hours of manual work — is completed in a fraction of the time. Less muscle fatigue, more projects per day, and the ability to complete large jobs with real efficiency.
home_p_34: Surface finishes come out cleaner with less excess grout. Less cleaning, less material waste — and a result that speaks for itself to every client.
home_p_35: Whether you're a tile contractor, a building materials store seller, or a high-level DIY-er — GROUTBOT is a product that sells itself from the first use.
home_p_36: GROUTBOT will deliver a finishing level that speaks for itself. The edges are clean, and the result lasts over time.
home_p_38: GROUTBOT is designed to completely change the way I work on sites. What I used to do by hand for hours — will be finished in minutes, with a much more uniform and professional result. I recommend it to every contractor who is serious about their work.
home_p_39: The difficulty in recruiting workers in the construction and finishing industry requires creative thinking. GROUTBOT has taken up the challenge in one of the most difficult jobs in the industry. Filling grout between tiles. There's no doubt the device will succeed tremendously.
home_p_40: We will recommend GROUTBOT to every contractor who purchases flooring from us. The tool is designed simply for use, the solution is reliable. There's no doubt the device will become one of our best-selling products in the store.
home_p_41: GROUTBOT is currently in development stages. Come be part of the success. The funding round is about to close soon.
home_p_42: GROUTBOT is developed to deliver work speed three times faster compared to manual grout application in joints
home_p_43: Smart mechanisms that maintain consistency in line thickness — uniform results in every joint, every project
home_p_44: [According to analyst studies conducted by the company]
home_p_45: Professional experience required — also suitable for home DIY renovators
home_p_47: Behind every successful project stands a professional and dedicated team. GROUTBOT people bring with them years of experience, technical expertise and genuine passion for quality — so that every job looks and feels perfect.
home_p_48: CEO, entrepreneur, and founder of GROUTBOT
home_p_49: With entrepreneurship in his nature and great faith, Moti brings with him extensive experience from the healthcare world. Critical thinking, informed decisions, patience and adherence to the goal
home_p_51: Ali is a certified mechanical engineer with exceptional talent. He leads the design and development of multidisciplinary systems, integrating from concept to working product, with expertise in robotics and mechanical mechanisms
home_p_53: Field analyst and responsible for coordinating product specification with end users.
home_p_54: Want a GROUTBOT pilot at your construction site?
home_p_56: GROUTBOT brings advanced technology development for fast, precise, and professional grout filling. Funding round in progress
home_p_57: Professional solutions for filling grout between tile surfaces — for contractors and  homeowners.
new_p_183: Ali is a licensed mechanical engineer with exceptional talent. He leads the design and development of multidisciplinary systems, integrating from concept to working product, with specialization in robotics and mechanical mechanisms

accessibility_p_12:
GROUTBOT is committed to making services accessible to the general public. We work to implement the Israeli standard 
            (IS 5568) guidelines based on WCAG 2.1 AA level guidelines.
accessibility_p_13:
We believe in equal rights and in every person's right to receive information and services independently and equally. 
            This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.
accessibility_p_14: The website complies with WCAG 2.1 AA level standard, which includes:
accessibility_p_16: We work continuously to improve website accessibility and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.
accessibility_p_17: If you encountered an accessibility problem on the website or need assistance, please contact us:
accessibility_p_18: Response times: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.
accessibility_p_19: Complaints: You can file a complaint with the Ministry of Justice - Commission for Equal Rights of Persons with Disabilities
